endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupEngines
endpoints.description: Backup management servers registered to Recovery Services Vault. Returns a pageable list of servers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupEngines/{backupEngineName}
endpoints.description: Returns backup management server registered to Recovery Services Vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{BACKUPENGINENAME}} with a real backupenginename. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/operationResults/{operationId}
endpoints.description: Provides the result of the refresh operation triggered by the BeginRefresh operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectableContainers
endpoints.description: Lists the containers that can be registered to Recovery Services Vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}
endpoints.description: Gets details of the specific container registered to your Recovery Services Vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: PUT /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}
endpoints.description:
Registers the container with Recovery Services vault.
This is an asynchronous operation. To track the operation status, use location header to call get latest status of
the operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}
endpoints.description:
Unregisters the given container from your Recovery Services Vault. This is an asynchronous operation. To determine
whether the backend service has finished processing the request, call Get Container Operation Result API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: Inquires all the protectable items under the given container.
endpoints.description: This is an async operation and the results should be tracked using location header or Azure-async-url.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/items
endpoints.description:
Provides a pageable list of workload item of a specific container according to the query filter and the pagination
parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/operationResults/{operationId}
endpoints.description: Fetches the result of any operation on the container.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: POST /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/protectedItems/{protectedItemName}/backup
endpoints.description:
Triggers backup for specified backed up item. This is an asynchronous operation. To know the status of the
operation, call GetProtectedItemOperationResult API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{PROTECTEDITEMNAME}} with a real protecteditemname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/protectedItems/{protectedItemName}/operationsStatus/{operationId}
endpoints.description:
Fetches the status of an operation such as triggering a backup, restore. The status can be in progress, completed
or failed. You can refer to the OperationStatus enum for all the possible states of the operation. Some operations
create jobs. This method returns the list of jobs associated with the operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{PROTECTEDITEMNAME}} with a real protecteditemname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: POST /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/protectedItems/{protectedItemName}/recoveryPoints/{recoveryPointId}/provisionInstantItemRecovery
endpoints.description:
Provisions a script which invokes an iSCSI connection to the backup data. Executing this script opens a file
explorer displaying all the recoverable files and folders. This is an asynchronous operation. To know the status of
provisioning, call GetProtectedItemOperationResult API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{RECOVERYPOINTID}} with a real recoverypointid. Replace {{PROTECTEDITEMNAME}} with a real protecteditemname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: POST /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/protectionContainers/{containerName}/protectedItems/{protectedItemName}/recoveryPoints/{recoveryPointId}/revokeInstantItemRecovery
endpoints.description:
Revokes an iSCSI connection which can be used to download a script. Executing this script opens a file explorer
displaying all recoverable files and folders. This is an asynchronous operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CONTAINERNAME}} with a real containername. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{RECOVERYPOINTID}} with a real recoverypointid. Replace {{PROTECTEDITEMNAME}} with a real protecteditemname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: POST /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupFabrics/{fabricName}/refreshContainers
endpoints.description:
Discovers all the containers in the subscription that can be backed up to Recovery Services Vault. This is an
asynchronous operation. To know the status of the operation, call GetRefreshOperationResult API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FABRICNAME}} with a real fabricname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupOperationResults/{operationId}
endpoints.description:
Provides the status of the delete operations such as deleting backed up item. Once the operation has started, the
status code in the response would be Accepted. It will continue to be in this state till it reaches completion. On
successful completion, the status code will be OK. This method expects OperationID as an argument. OperationID is
part of the Location header of the operation response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupOperations/{operationId}
endpoints.description:
Fetches the status of an operation such as triggering a backup, restore. The status can be in progress, completed
or failed. You can refer to the OperationStatus enum for all the possible states of an operation. Some operations
create jobs. This method returns the list of jobs when the operation is complete.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupPolicies/{policyName}
endpoints.description:
Deletes specified backup policy from your Recovery Services Vault. This is an asynchronous operation. Status of the
operation can be fetched using GetPolicyOperationResult API.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{POLICYNAME}} with a real policyname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupPolicies/{policyName}/operations/{operationId}
endpoints.description:
Provides the status of the asynchronous operations like backup, restore. The status can be in progress, completed
or failed. You can refer to the Operation Status enum for all the possible states of an operation. Some operations
create jobs. This method returns the list of jobs associated with operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname. Replace {{POLICYNAME}} with a real policyname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupProtectableItems
endpoints.description:
Provides a pageable list of protectable objects within your subscription according to the query filter and the
pagination parameters.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: GET /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupProtectionContainers
endpoints.description: Lists the containers registered to Recovery Services Vault.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.name: POST /Subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.RecoveryServices/vaults/{vaultName}/backupSecurityPIN
endpoints.description: Get the security PIN.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VAULTNAME}} with a real vaultname.

endpoints.description: Updates vault storage model type.
